module.name: mark
module.description: Highlighted text. The text to highlight is the block body, so it may contain spaces, commas and inline Markdown. Renders inline.
module.aiSpec: Highlight (marker-pen) a span of text to draw attention to it. The body is the text to highlight; it may contain spaces, commas and inline Markdown. Renders inline despite being a block module, so it flows mid-sentence. Set `color` for the highlight background.

snippet.label: Highlight
snippet.description: Highlighted (marked) text. Body = the text to highlight.
